title: Luish's Guns
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B7mse6BL/images/5ae689fc240893c819f82ceb2014670e77e66ba9.png)
# Luish's Guns
This data pack & mod aims to add new survival-friendly and vanilla-like guns to the game.
## 😎 Features:
- Shooting animations
- The weapons have durability
- Craftables ammunitions
- Completely realistic physics (shoots destroy glass and fragile blocks, shotguns fire multiple pellets that are randomly spreaded, shoots are not completely accurate...)
- The weapons are based on real guns of the industrial revolution era, but not on any specific model
- Weapons are obtainable in some loot chests around the world (pillager outposts and villages)
- Fully balanced mechanics
## 🔫 List of weapons
### Rifle
![Rifle Shooting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/534eac4554d723097c73f1da923b2fe7174ac7d5.gif)
### Shotgun
![Shotgun Shooting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb577928d8f32dfa32fb0bfb5360f293a390f8b1.gif)
### Double-barreled Shotgun
![Double-Barreled Shotgun Shooting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e797ebf519ff4e771a39c9ebc1ab1b2efaf0ff0a.gif)

**More weapons will be added as updates progress!**

## Guns Crafting
Because this project is in alpha phase, crafting is experimental and requires installing an optional add-on to access. However, if you don't install the add-on, you can still find the guns in pillager outposts and villages, and you'll still be able to craft ammunition.

- **[Click here to go to it](https://modrinth.com/datapack/luishs-guns-crafting-add-on)**

_It is also worth noting that a special crafting table for guns is planned to be added in a future update._

## Ammunitions Crafting
![Bullets Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8825a8878da3875d32b880ce9d3ea7191ca19b5b.png)   ![Shells Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/426c83d21ba50f236b7cb599b53b1114ad0bc450.png)

Use the command /loot give @s loot lg:[​item].
